_deprecation.note: This legacy registry remains for backward compatibility. The canonical shadcn-compatible registry now lives at /registry/index.json with all 38 catalog items, peer-pack relationships resolved as registryDependencies, and aesthetic-pack cssVars derived from DTCG 2025.10 overrides. Consumers should migrate before 2027.x. See DISTRIBUTION.md for the migration guide.

items.name: button-system
items.title: Button System
items.description: Foundational button primitives — 5 intents (primary / secondary / ghost / destructive / link) × 4 sizes × 8 microstates + button-group composition. The single most-composed pattern; consumed by every pattern with a CTA.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: Sortable, filterable, paginated tabular data with selection, bulk actions, inline editing, and density toggle. Composes empty-state for the empty/error cells.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: Reusable empty / filtered-empty / error / forbidden state container — 4 variants × 3 sizes. Promoted from data-table's empty cell; consumed by data-table, modal-dialog, and any container that can be empty.

items.name: feature-grid
items.title: Feature Grid
items.description: Marketing feature grid — 5 layouts (three-up / four-tile / six-tile / bento / steps) × 4 cell variants × 6 grid-level states.

items.name: footer-mega
items.title: Footer (Mega)
items.description: Marketing site footer — 4 variants from minimal auth-page footer to flagship mega with newsletter (composes form-fields + button-system) and locale picker.

items.name: form-fields
items.title: Form Fields
items.description: Text / email / number / select / textarea / checkbox / radio inputs with default / focus / disabled / readonly / error states. 33 declared tokens, 8 microstates, 4 field-level states.

items.name: form-validation
items.title: Form Validation
items.description: Inline error display + field-level + form-level error summary. Live-region announcement on submit; per-field error linkage via aria-describedby.

items.name: hero
items.title: Hero
items.description: Unified hero pattern — 5 variants (type-only / animated / gradient-mesh / brand-photo / video) sharing a 6-slot mandatory anatomy + 5 conditional slots gated by data-variant. Consolidated from 5 parallel packs per Phase 22 Cons. 3.

items.name: modal-dialog
items.title: Modal Dialog
items.description: Accessible modal with focus trap, ESC-to-close, scrim click, scroll lock; WCAG 2.4.3 + 2.4.11 dismissal contracts. Built on native <dialog> where available.

items.name: nav
items.title: Nav
items.description: Unified nav pattern — 4 variants (marketing / app-chrome / docs / editorial) sharing 2 mandatory + 17 conditional slots. Consolidated from 4 parallel packs per Phase 22 Cons. 4.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: Application page title bar with breadcrumb, status badges, and primary / overflow actions.

items.name: pricing-tiers
items.title: Pricing Tiers
items.description: Pricing comparison cards with monthly / annual toggle, feature checklist, and per-tier CTA. "Popular" badge on featured tier.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: Numeric stat display with trend indicator, sparkline slot, and optional context label. Tabular numerics enforced.

items.name: testimonial
items.title: Testimonial
items.description: Customer quote cards — compact / default / featured variants with avatar-stack attribution + 7 microstates.

items.name: toast-notifier
items.title: Toast Notifier
items.description: Toast notification system with stacking, auto-dismiss, action affordance, and live-region announcement.

items.name: prim-label
items.title: Label (primitive)
items.description: Label primitive — single bounded text with optional icon and optional dismiss. 5 variants (badge / status / tag / chip / dismissible) × 8 tones × 2 sizes. Consolidated from inlined badge / status-pill contracts across hero, pricing-tiers, nav, page-header per Phase 22 Cons. 5.

items.name: prim-sequence
items.title: Sequence (primitive)
items.description: Sequence primitive — ordered/contextual list of items with separator + position-semantic state. 4 variants (breadcrumb / ordered-list / unordered-list / sidebar-vertical). Consolidated from inlined breadcrumb + sidebar-list contracts in nav per Phase 22 Cons. 6.

items.name: prim-decoration-overlay
items.title: Decoration overlay (primitive)
items.description: Decoration overlay primitive — positioned-absolute decorative layer. 4 variants (grain / texture / pattern / gradient). Forward-looking infrastructure per Phase 22 Cons. 7; ready for Boeing Watch and other aesthetic packs.

items.name: prim-searchable-list
items.title: Searchable list (primitive)
items.description: Searchable list primitive — search input + filtered result list. Combobox/listbox ARIA pattern. 3 variants (command-palette / autocomplete-results / filter-dropdown). Composes form-fields (required) + prim-label (optional). Phase 22 Cons. 8.

items.name: disclosure
items.title: Disclosure (translated from ARIA APG)
items.description: Disclosure pattern. Button + toggled content region. Foundational expand/collapse anatomy. Translation from W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide (W3C Document License). Phase 22.7.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox (translated from ARIA APG)
items.description: Combobox pattern. Text input + popup listbox. Four ARIA APG 1.2 variants (autocomplete-list / inline / both / none). Composes form-fields (required) + prim-searchable-list + prim-label (optional). Translation from W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. Phase 22.7.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs (translated from ARIA APG)
items.description: Tabs pattern. Tablist + tabs + tabpanels. Horizontal/vertical × automatic/manual activation. Roving tabindex. Translation from W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. Phase 22.7.

items.name: prim-stack
items.title: Stack (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — vertical stack of children with consistent gap. Universal foundation for any vertical content rhythm. 5 gap variants (xs/sm/md/lg/xl) × 4 align variants × optional recursive mode. Phase 22.6 layout-primitive layer.

items.name: prim-cluster
items.title: Cluster (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — horizontal grouping with wrapping. Universal for nav links, button groups, tag clouds, action bars, breadcrumbs. 4 gap × 5 justify × 5 align × 2 wrap variants. Phase 22.6.

items.name: prim-center
items.title: Center (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — center content one or both axes with max-width. 3 axes × 4 max-width × 3 padding variants. The canonical max-width prose column. Phase 22.6.

items.name: prim-grid
items.title: Grid (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — auto-fit grid with min-width per cell. Cells reflow into columns without media queries. 4 min-cell variants × 4 gap × 4 max-columns × 3 align variants. Foundation for feature-grid / pricing-tiers / card lists. Phase 22.6.

items.name: prim-sidebar
items.title: Sidebar (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — sidebar + main content, container-query responsive (Baseline 2024). Above threshold: side-by-side flex; below: stacked. 2 sides × 3 widths × 3 thresholds. Used by docs page, settings page, dashboard. Phase 22.6.

items.name: prim-switcher
items.title: Switcher (layout primitive)
items.description: Layout primitive — row that flips to column below a container-width threshold. Container queries (Baseline 2024). For two-column blocks that should stack on narrow containers. 3 thresholds × 4 gaps × 4 align variants. Phase 22.6.

items.name: tokens-baseline
items.title: Tokens (Baseline)
items.description: Canonical token namespace — 175 tokens across 11 DTCG 2025.10 types. Surfaces, text, accent + status, spacing, type sizes + leading + tracking, font families (system-stack fallbacks), font weights, radii, focus + shadow, motion + easing. Frozen at v1.0. Load this first; aesthetic packs override on top.
